summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Planora calendar/scheduling app. All core functionality working correctly including authentication, calendar management, event/task CRUD, availability settings, and booking system.

design_issues.issue: Clipboard write permission denied in browser automation environment
design_issues.note: This is a browser security limitation in automation environment, not a functional bug

design_issues.issue: Webpack dev server overlay occasionally appears and blocks interactions
design_issues.note: Development environment issue, not present in production

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads after authentication with calendar view
Create event modal opens and creates event
Create task modal opens and creates task
Availability page loads and saves working hours
Booking page (/book/:userId) loads and shows available slots
Booking page allows guest to book a meeting
Settings page loads with theme toggle and booking link
Seed data endpoint creates mock data for new users

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All core functionality working, minor browser automation issues)
